claims.quote: Page Not FoundThe page you are trying to reach is not available on our site.
claims.claimText: URL was pre-classified as PHYSICIAN_CAREERS but the cleaned text is a Mayo Clinic 'Page Not Found' site-help stub with no career content.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Content is a 404/site-help page containing no Tier 1/2/3 substantive material; pre-classified family does not match content.
claims.limitations: Source returned a 404 stub; no physician-careers content available to extract.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: Page Not FoundThe page you are trying to reach is not available on our site.
claims.claimText: Source URL returns a Page Not Found / 404 page; no provider-careers content available at this URL.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: The cleaned text is a 404 error page with no career/training content; no tier applies.
claims.limitations: Source is a 404 page; no substantive content to extract.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: Page Not FoundThe page you are trying to reach is not available on our site.
claims.claimText: URL /visa pre-classified as VISA_IMMIGRATION (Tier 3) but the cleaned text is a 404 Page Not Found with no visa or sponsorship content. Source-family/content mismatch.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Page is a 404 error page with no substantive content in any tier; URL-hint of VISA_IMMIGRATION does not match actual page content.
claims.limitations: Hint family was based on URL only; the page returns 404 and contains only site chrome and the not-found notice.
claims.visibilityRationale: shadow/volunteer is not auto-USCE; human review required

claims.quote: More from Mayo ClinicPatient care and health informationResearch labs and clinical trialsGiving and philanthropyFor medical professionalsJob openings
claims.claimText: Site footer surfaces a 'Job openings' link to Mayo Clinic careers, a Tier 3 post-trainee signal.
claims.limitations: Footer link only; no role/visa detail on this page.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Job openings link is a Tier 3 attending/career signal; A1 had no Tier 3 claim.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 mined the academic body but did not record the footer Job openings Tier 3 pointer.

claims.quote:
Executive Education
Healthcare administration courses for leaders and medical education consulting for organizations
claims.claimText: Mayo Clinic offers Executive Education: healthcare administration courses for leaders and medical education consulting for organizations.
claims.limitations: Healthcare administration / consulting, not clinical practice.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Executive education targets practicing leaders; Tier 3 post-trainee.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 stopped at GME and visa; did not enumerate executive-education service tier.

claims.quote:
Continuous professional development
Continuing education courses for medical professionals
claims.claimText: Mayo Clinic provides Continuous Professional Development continuing-education courses for practicing medical professionals.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: CME for practicing professionals is Tier 3 post-trainee.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 did not separate CME from the academic-program list; treated it as part of system overview.
